title: Infected-hLEC-1
characteristics_ch1: cell type: primary human lymphatic endothelial cell
treatment_protocol_ch1: Mtb cultures were grown to exponential phase before being used to infect hLECs at MOI of 10 for 5 hours. Cells were washed free of Mtb with PBS and cultured for 48h with gentamicin.
growth_protocol_ch1: Primary hLEC were cultured up to 5 passages in complete endothelial cell medium
extract_protocol_ch1: Cells were lysed with TRIzol and total RNA was extracted using Direct-zol RNA miniprep kit
extract_protocol_ch1.1: RNA-Seq libraries were constructed using TruSeq Stranded Total RNA Library Prep Kit
